problem.title: X-ICP on the second public HDL-400 reference window
problem.question: How does X-ICP perform on the second public HDL-400 reference window?

dataset.reference_role: public reference trajectory sliced from the HDL-400 pose trace export

variants.label: Default (GT seed)
variants.intent: Repository default with ground-truth seed initialization.

variants.label: Fast (GT seed)
variants.intent: Coarser voxel map and smaller working set while keeping the GT-seeded initialization path.

variants.label: Dense (GT seed)
variants.intent: Finer voxel map and larger correspondence budget while keeping the GT-seeded initialization path.

variants.label: No GT seed
variants.intent: Ablation without ground-truth seed to test convergence from identity.
